name: GIVBUX, INC.
business: The Company, through its wholly owned subsidiary, GivBux Global Partners, Inc., is engaged in the Fin-Tech mobile wallet sector, specifically a Super App that will change the way the world makes purchases while making charitable contributions. The GivBux Super App includes a point-of-sale payment system by means of a consumer's Mobile Wallet. The company receives marketing fees from participating merchants and shares these revenues with users.

exposures.sentence: The Company, through its wholly owned subsidiary, GivBux Global Partners, Inc., is engaged in the Fin-Tech mobile wallet sector, specifically a Super App that will change the way the world makes purchases while making charitable contributions.
Any actual or perceived breach of our system that would result in disclosure of such information could materially impact our business.

catalysts.event: Release of newer version of the Super App
catalysts.sentence: A newer version of the Super App is scheduled for release early 2026
